series_metadata.series_title: Lake Erie Shore Erosion Management Program Working
series_metadata.series_description: Working Lake Erie Shore Erosion Management Program (LESEMP) records to include research & resource data, documents/files incidental to the process of creating published records, and draft copies for each reach used to create final LESEMP records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: final LESEMP record is complete/approved. ; Electronic: final LESEMP record is complete/approved
